designConstraints: Single-column centered layout with max-width 640px, centered within the 1280px content max-width grid
8px spacing unit system — use scale values [4, 8, 12, 16, 24, 32, 48, 64]px for all margins, paddings, and gaps
Maximum 3 levels of visual hierarchy: hero amount input (primary), form field sections (secondary), helper text and counters (tertiary)
Background uses background-primary (deep-navy #0F172A); form surface cards use surface-primary (navy-surface #1E293B) with elevation level 1 shadow
All interactive chip elements (CategoryChipGrid, PaymentMethodChipRow, QuickAddChip) must use pill border-radius (9999px) and meet 44px minimum touch target height
AmountHeroInput must use heading-1 typography scale (DM Sans, 24px, weight 700) at minimum, scaled up for hero prominence — large numeric display treatment
SaveExpenseButton must be full-width, using cta-primary (gold-amber #F59E0B) background with text-on-cta (deep-navy #0F172A) text, border-radius medium (10px)
Active/selected chip states use cta-primary (gold-amber #F59E0B) border and background tint; unselected chips use border-default (slate-border #334155) on surface-elevated (navy-raised #293548)
Focus ring: 2px solid gold-amber (#F59E0B) with 2px offset on all interactive elements
MiniCalendarDropdown and NewCategoryInlineForm overlays use elevation level 2 shadow (0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)) and z-index dropdown (1000)
ColorPickerRow swatches must be at least 32px diameter with a 2px selected indicator ring in gold-amber
CharacterCounter uses label typography (DM Mono, 12px, weight 500) in text-secondary (muted-text #64748B), right-aligned below NoteInput
TopBar and NavigationTabs are shared components — must match exact visual treatment used on dashboard and spending-insights pages
QuickAddSuggestions section appears above the main form fields as a horizontal scrollable chip row
Form pre-fill state (edit mode) must visually distinguish from new entry mode — TopBar title changes from 'Add Expense' to 'Edit Expense'
Desktop-first layout at 1440px viewport; tablet breakpoint (768px) maintains single-column with adjusted horizontal padding (16px margin)
referencePatterns: Hero input pattern — oversized numeric display with currency prefix, centered, prominent on dark surface (consistent with fintech dashboard aesthetic)
Chip grid selection pattern — horizontally wrapping pill chips with active/inactive states, used for both CategoryChipGrid and PaymentMethodChipRow
Inline form expansion pattern — NewCategoryInlineForm expands within the CategoryChipGrid section without navigating away, using surface-elevated background
Quick Add suggestion chips — horizontal scrollable row of pre-filled action chips above the form, consistent with dashboard EmptyState CTA pattern
Mini calendar dropdown — anchored below DatePickerInput trigger, elevation level 2, dismissible on outside click
Full-width CTA button pattern — SaveExpenseButton spans full column width, fixed to bottom of form or sticky at viewport bottom on scroll
Character counter pattern — inline counter below NoteInput, right-aligned, updates reactively as user types
Back navigation pattern — TopBar left arrow returns to dashboard, consistent with shared TopBar component across all pages
Form pre-fill / edit mode pattern — all fields populated from existing Expense entity when navigated from dashboard Edit action
accessibilityRequirements: WCAG 2.1 AA color contrast ratio of 4.5:1 minimum for all text — silver-text (#CBD5E1) on deep-navy (#0F172A) achieves ~11:1; gold-amber (#F59E0B) on deep-navy achieves ~8.5:1
AmountHeroInput must have a visible label (visually hidden acceptable) with aria-label='Expense amount' and aria-describedby linking to currency indicator
CategoryChipGrid must be implemented as a radiogroup with role='radiogroup', aria-label='Select category', and each chip as role='radio' with aria-checked state
PaymentMethodChipRow must follow the same radiogroup/radio ARIA pattern as CategoryChipGrid with aria-label='Select payment method'
QuickAddChip elements must have aria-label describing the suggestion content (e.g., 'Quick add: Coffee, $4.50, Food & Drink')

MiniCalendarDropdown must be keyboard navigable — arrow keys move between dates, Enter selects, Escape closes; implement aria-label='Date picker calendar' and aria-live='polite' for selected date announcement
NewCategoryInlineForm expansion must announce to screen readers via aria-live='polite' region when the inline form appears or collapses
ColorPickerRow swatches must have aria-label='Select color: [color name]' and aria-pressed state for selected swatch
NoteInput must have associated visible or visually-hidden label and CharacterCounter linked via aria-describedby
SaveExpenseButton must have descriptive aria-label that reflects mode: 'Save expense' or 'Update expense' in edit mode
All form validation errors must be announced via aria-live='assertive' and associated with the relevant input via aria-describedby; error text uses coral-error (#F87171)
Focus management: when navigating to add-expense in edit mode, focus must be set to AmountHeroInput on page load; when MiniCalendarDropdown closes, focus returns to DatePickerInput trigger
Minimum touch target of 44x44px for all interactive elements including chips, color swatches, and icon buttons
TopBar back arrow button must have aria-label='Go back to Dashboard'
NavigationTabs must use role='tablist' with each tab as role='tab' and aria-selected state, consistent with shared component implementation across all pages
dataModelDependencies: Expense entity — fields: id, amount, merchant, category_id, date, payment_method_id, note, currency; used for pre-filling all form fields in edit mode and for POST/PUT on save via create-expense and update-expense endpoints

Category entity — fields: id, name, color_token, color_hex, icon, is_default, sort_order; drives CategoryChipGrid chip rendering and NewCategoryInlineForm creation via get-categories and create-category endpoints
PaymentMethod entity — fields: id, name, type, icon, last_four, is_default; drives PaymentMethodChipRow chip rendering via get-payment-methods endpoint

QuickAddSuggestion entity — fields: id, merchant, amount, category_id, payment_method_id, emoji, frequency, last_used_at; drives QuickAddSuggestions chip row via get-quick-add-suggestions endpoint (top 4 by frequency/recency)
UserSettings entity — fields: currency, locale; required for currency symbol display in AmountHeroInput and amount formatting via get-user-settings endpoint
